title: peucedanum selinoides
intro: Peucedanum selinoides, also known as Selinum wallichianum or False Carrot, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Peucedanum selinoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine practices.
